Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine and low total CO₂, suggesting impaired renal function and possible metabolic acidosis. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance, supporting renal dysfunction, possibly diabetic nephropathy or another glomerular pathology. HbA1c is unexpectedly low, which may warrant repeat testing or consideration of interfering factors. Recommend nephrology evaluation and further assessment of glycemic status.
